homepage.clients_label: Trusted by teams building real things
homepage.work_heading: Brands we've helped move from good to unmissable.
homepage.wheel_heading: A synchronized powerhouse, not scattered pieces.
homepage.wheel_desc: We bring strategy, creativity, and development under one unified system. No dropped balls, no agency blame-games — just a seamless team driving your brand forward.
homepage.svc_acc_heading: Click any service to open it.

homepage.process_heading: From initial blueprint to absolute market dominance.

process_steps.title: Deconstruct and analyze
process_steps.desc: We deep-dive into your existing data, audience behavior, and market gaps to uncover the raw truths of where your growth is hiding.

process_steps.title: Blueprint the strategy
process_steps.desc: No guesswork. We map out a tailored operational framework, defining your precise brand positioning and the exact channels we will weaponize.

process_steps.title: Deploy high-tier assets
process_steps.desc: We launch precision-engineered websites, hard-hitting campaigns, and premium content — built flawlessly, optimized for speed, and ready to convert.

process_steps.title: Scale the momentum
process_steps.desc: Through ruthless optimization, performance scaling, and continuous tracking, we turn early wins into compounding long-term revenue.

faq_items.a: Usually 2–3 weeks from signed SOW. Discovery calls happen in the first 48 hours.

faq_items.q: Do you work with early-stage startups?
faq_items.a: Yes — we have a "Lite" brand sprint tailored for pre-Series A companies.
Three offices: Lahore HQ, Dubai, and Toronto. We work with clients in 12 countries remote-first.

faq_items.q: Do you do one-off projects or only retainers?
faq_items.a: Both. Project sprints start at $18k. Retainers start at $24k/mo.

faq_items.q: What industries do you specialize in?
faq_items.a: Travel, healthcare, e-commerce, SaaS and industrial B2B.

homepage.testimonial_quote: Switching to a single unified agency changed everything. Digibit synchronized our ads, tech, and creative seamlessly — driving our conversions up 340% while cutting our management stress to zero.
homepage.cta_heading: Got a brand that deserves to be unmissable?

about.hero_heading: We are a powerhouse of designers, creators, and developers engineering integrated growth for ambitious brands.
reason_paragraphs: Traditional agencies operate in silos. The brand strategists don't talk to the developers, and the developers have no clue what the marketing team is running. This fragmentation forces you to act as the middleman, wasting hours fixing misaligned communication and disjointed assets.

Digibit eliminates that friction entirely. We function as a single, synchronized ecosystem where strategy, design, engineering, and performance marketing live under one roof. When our developers build a feature in Q1, it seamlessly fuels the automated marketing campaigns we scale in Q4.

Operating as an elite team across Lahore, Dubai, and Toronto, we intentionally limit our client roster. We don't take on every project that comes our way — we only partner with brands where we can deliver undeniable, compounding growth and stick around to scale it long after launch.
about.beliefs_heading: Our core convictions behind every single product.

beliefs_cards.title: Premium is a standard, not an option.
beliefs_cards.desc: Every layout line, line of code, and ad copy is an opportunity to outclass the noise. We build with relentless attention to detail because average doesn't cut it in today's market.

beliefs_cards.title: Cut the noise, speak the truth.
beliefs_cards.desc: Buzzwords and marketing jargon are just distractions. We communicate with absolute clarity and focus on the human on the other side of the screen — building real trust, not just hype.

beliefs_cards.title: Execution over overthinking.
beliefs_cards.desc: A live product driving real traffic beats a perfect mockup sitting on a design board forever. We prioritize rapid, elite execution and then optimize in real-time based on actual data.

about.timeline_heading: Our Journey: Eight years of transparent growth.

timeline_entries.title: The Foundation
timeline_entries.desc: Founded in Lahore by three visionaries, Digibit was built to disrupt the agency landscape by seamlessly integrating design, development, and scalable marketing strategies.

timeline_entries.title: Resilience & Scale
timeline_entries.desc: Adapting swiftly to a global shift, we went remote-first, expanded our workforce, and launched our first million-dollar e-commerce platform while refining our customer retention frameworks.

timeline_entries.title: Global Reach: Dubai
timeline_entries.desc: We established our Dubai headquarters to serve the MENA market, elevating major brands and scaling sophisticated, data-driven paid media campaigns at an enterprise level.

timeline_entries.title: Cross-Continental Expansion
timeline_entries.desc: Launching our Toronto hub allowed us to capture the North American market, fully formalizing our comprehensive 360° ecosystem under a single, streamlined retainer.

timeline_entries.title: The Trusted Growth Partner
timeline_entries.desc: Today, our team of 24 experts operates across 3 strategic cities, having shipped over 180 projects. We remain dedicated to being the most reliable execution partner for ambitious founders.

pricing.hero_heading: Engagement models tailored to your scale.
pricing.hero_desc: Most agencies hide their pricing. We don't. Here's roughly what each engagement costs.

plans.title: Project Sprint
plans.sub: A highly focused, milestone-driven engagement with a defined scope, fixed timeline, and transparent pricing — ideal for targeted initiatives like a brand overhaul, platform deployment, or campaign launch.

plans.title: 360° Retainer
plans.sub: A comprehensive, ongoing partnership where we orchestrate your entire growth ecosystem — seamlessly integrating strategy, creative design, paid media management, content production, and data analytics.

plans.title: Embedded Pod
plans.sub: A dedicated team of specialized talent integrated directly within your organization. Operating with shared workflows, collaborative tools, and absolute alignment on your key performance indicators (KPIs).

pricing.addons_heading: Plug-in services we bolt onto any engagement.

addons.title: Photo & video day
addons.desc: Studio or on-location. One shooter, one producer, full post.

addons.title: Motion & animation
addons.desc: Logo animations, ad cuts, loop sequences for social.

addons.title: Analytics setup
addons.desc: GA4, server-side tags, dashboard, and a working session.

addons.title: Landing page sprint
addons.desc: Single high-intent page, designed and shipped.

addons.title: Brand audit
addons.desc: Independent read on your positioning, identity and voice.

pricing.cta_heading: Not sure which fits? Let's just talk.

careers.hero_heading: Come build bold brands with great teams.
careers.hero_desc: We're a lean, high-velocity agency with a massive appetite for impact. If you thrive on true ownership, respect the craft, and want your execution to actually move the needle — let's talk.
careers.why_heading: An agency built for absolute velocity.

perks.title: Direct access, zero fluff.
perks.desc: We eliminate account layers. You work side-by-side with senior strategists who make decisions in real time.

perks.title: Quality over volume.
perks.desc: We cap our active client list. Fewer accounts mean your brand gets our team's deep, undivided creative energy.

perks.title: Distributed to scale.
perks.desc: Operating across key regional hubs. We collaborate seamlessly across borders to keep your campaigns moving 24/7.

perks.title: Continuous edge.
perks.desc: Dedicated iteration budgets. We constantly test new tools and premium frameworks so your brand stays ahead of the curve.

insights.hero_heading: What we're building, breaking, and talking about this week.
insights.hero_desc: No fluff, no gatekeeping, and absolutely no generic AI advice. Just the links, strategies, and industry shifts we're actually paying attention to right now.
insights.featured_title: What's keeping us up, making us think, and getting shipped.
insights.featured_desc: We filter out the noise so you don't have to. Get the exact marketing insights, design inspirations, and campaign breakdowns our team exchanges daily.

posts.title: The danger of a safe brand name.
posts.desc: Why selecting a brand identity that satisfies everyone internally guarantees you will be ignored by the market.

posts.title: Storytelling on a razor-thin timeline.
posts.desc: Tactical lessons from managing multi-location commercial shoots without sacrificing premium visual quality.

posts.title: Micro-copy holds the macro conversion.
posts.desc: How minor adjustments to form fields and error states can quietly patch holes in your checkout funnel.

posts.title: Stop buying impressions. Start engineering conversions.
posts.desc: A transparent look at why optimizing strictly for vanity traffic keeps your client acquisition cost unnecessarily high.

posts.title: Mapping consumer journeys in industries that never stop moving.
posts.desc: What we learned about buyer intent after analyzing thousands of user sessions for a luxury service brand.

posts.title: If your headline is clever, it's probably losing money.
posts.desc: Why clear, unfiltered value propositions outperform mysterious, poetic brand statements in head-to-head testing.

insights.newsletter_desc: We do the testing, we track the results, and we filter the noise. Just one high-impact email a month to help you scale your brand.

work.hero_desc: This is a snapshot of our favorite engagements. If you are looking for specific industry breakdowns — including the complex overhauls and pre-launch brand strategies — ask us for a private walkthrough.
